Hearing On The Petition To Approve The Compromise Of A Disputed Claim Of A Minor.
Off Calendar Dec-16-2010 Granted Per Written Order

Hearing On The Petition To Approve The Compromise Of A Disputed Claim Of A Minor - Lillian Phan.
Off Calendar Dec-16-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for hearing on the Petition to Compromise the Disputed Claim of a Minor.
Dept. 218, Comm. Everett A. Hewlett, Jr., Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Helen Sorep-Matley, 225.

Lori Wallerstein, Esq. appeared with petitioner Diane Nguyen, who was present as Guardian ad Litem for the minors Lilian Phan and Vianne Phan, both of whom were present at today's hearing.
Petitioners and the minors were placed under oath and examined.

On the basis of evidence received, and good cause appearing, the Petition is granted and compromise is approved.

As to Lilian Phan:

Settlement Amount - $141,500.00.
Attorney Fees - $4,804.33.
Costs - $103,945.67.

The sum of $30,000.00 shall be made payable to Brant Hickey and Associates or designee, to fund the structed settlement as described in Attachment 7c(2)(b) of the Order Approving the Compromise. The remaining $2,750.00 shall be made payable to petitioner Diane Nguyen, with said funds to be used exclusively for the benefit of the minor as set forth in the petition.

As to Vianne Phan:

Settlement Amount - $141,500.00.
Attorney Fees - $4,804.33.
Costs - $103,945.67.

The sum of $30,000.00 shall be made payable to Brant Hickey and Associates or designee, to fund the structed settlement as described in Attachment 7c(2)(b) of the Order Approving the Compromise. The remaining $2,750.00 shall be made payable to petitioner Diane Nguyen, with said funds to be used exclusively for the benefit of the minor as set forth in the petition.

Orders Approving the Compromise of a Disputed Claim of a Minor were submitted to and signed by the Court.
